text.title: Adobe Firefly Creative Cloud Integration Procedure

step.name: authenticate
step.action: OAuth into Firefly Services + Creative Cloud.

step.name: build-prompt
step.action: Compose prompt from subject + style + lighting + composition + brand tokens.

step.name: submit-generate
step.action: POST to Firefly Image v3; collect output URLs.

step.name: brand-audit
step.action: Run audit; pass = library; fail = review queue.

step.name: import-with-provenance
step.action: Attach provenance + designer + timestamp; commit to library.
